purpose: Trigger-behavior spec for deterministic lexical routing and manual behavior checks.

cases.prompt: build a durable agent backend on the harness engine
cases.assert: Verifies the engine and harness worker, gathers the four decisions, and scaffolds the agent.

cases.prompt: wire my script into the harness so other agents can call it
cases.assert: Scaffolds a callable ::run function with a completed-turn binding.

cases.prompt: make an always-on agent with workers and a cron trigger, no server
cases.assert: Uses the cron trigger with a 6-field expression and the installed worker set.

cases.prompt: turn this script into a durable agent with triggers
cases.assert: Scaffolds the turn-loop consumer with the requested trigger binding.

cases.prompt: orchestrate multiple models to fan this work out
cases.assert: Model-team orchestration without an engine routes to the orchestrator skill instead.

cases.prompt: write a cron job that curls my healthcheck
cases.assert: A plain cron job is not a harness agent; no engine involved.

cases.prompt: build me an express server that calls the openai api
cases.assert: A direct SDK web server does not involve the harness engine.
